dhp235:1: You are now like a yellowed leaf.
dhp235:3: You stand at the door to departure
dhp235:4: but have yet to provide for the journey.
dhp236:3: With impurities all blown away, unblemished,
dhp236:4: you’ll reach the divine realm of the noble ones.
dhp237:1: You are now right at the end of your time.
dhp237:2: You are headed to Yama’s presence,
dhp237:3: with no place to rest along the way,
dhp237:4: but have yet to provide for the journey.
dhp238:3: With impurities all blown away, unblemished,
dhp238:4: you won’t again undergo birth & aging.
dhp239:2: step by step, bit by bit, moment to moment,
dhp239:3: blows away the impurities of molten silver–
dhp239:4: so the wise man, his own.
dhp240:2: eats the very iron from which it is born,
dhp240:3: so the deeds of one who lives slovenly
dhp240:4: lead him on to a bad destination.
dhp241:1:
No recitation:
the ruinous impurity of chants.
dhp242:1: In a woman, misconduct is an impurity.
dhp242:3: Evil deeds are the real impurities
dhp244:1: Life’s easy to live for someone unscrupulous,
dhp246:4: goes to someone else’s wife, & is addicted to intoxicants, digs himself up by the root right here in this world.
dhp249:1: People give in line with their faith,
dhp249:4: at food & drink given to others,
dhp250:1: But one in whom this is cut through
dhp252:1: It’s easy to see the errors of others,
dhp252:2:
but hard to see your own.
You winnow like chaff
dhp252:6: like a cheat, an unlucky throw.
dhp253:1: If you focus on the errors of others,
dhp254:4: but devoid of objectification are the Tathagatas.
